blast_radius: Additive only: new function in engine/split/execute.go plus a new test function in execute_test.go. No existing exported signatures change. engine/graph/edge_append.go is not modified (reused as-is).
downstream_consumers: None yet call ExecuteSplitGraphEdges outside this subtask's own tests; 2b.3.6 is expected to wire it (and the other Execute* primitives) into a single WAL-covered transaction.
risk_areas: Directionality/topology choice for SPLIT_SIBLING edges (complete directed graph, both directions per pair) is a design decision documented in architecture-discovery.md; a future consumer expecting a different topology (e.g. star) would need to reconcile.
Crash-recovery/replay integration for graph edge appends remains unresolved by design, deferred to 2b.3.6 per architecture-discovery.md's reasoning; not fixed by this subtask.
newFileIDs ordering is sorted internally by this function for deterministic on-disk append order, independent of caller's map iteration order.
